name: Premium Background
description: Роскошный градиентный фон. Мягкий свет. Минимум декора. Премиум косметическая/технологическая реклама.
prompt_prefix: Premium product photography. Luxury gradient background. Soft studio lighting. Minimal decorative elements — at most a subtle silk drape or marble slab under the product. No full environment. Premium cosmetic and technology advertising style. Ultra realistic. 8K. Product is the hero.
composition: Product centered, elevated on minimal surface, soft gradient behind
lighting: Single key light with soft diffusion, subtle color accent rim light
